name: Cherries Jubilee - Glorious Liqueurs
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Vanilla or burgundy cherry ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the canned cherries, reserving it.
2. Measure out 1 1/2 cups of fresh orange juice.
3. In a chafing dish or skillet, combine sugar and cornstarch until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in the orange juice to create a sauce.
5. Cook the sauce over low heat until thickened and bubbly, about 1 minute.
6. Stir in the reserved cherry liquid and grated orange peel.
7. Heat the orange and/or cherry liqueur separately.
8. Pour the hot liqueur over the cherries.
9. Place the dessert on a heat-safe plate or stand.
10. Carefully ignite the sauce using a long match or lighter, allowing flames to subside.
11. Spoon the cherries and sauce around individual servings of ice cream.
12. Serve immediately.
